title: BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER
description:
Responsibilities:

- Planning and overseeing new marketing initiatives.

- Researching organizations and individuals to find new opportunities.

- Increasing the value of current customers while attracting new ones.

- Finding and developing new markets and improving sales.

- Attending conferences, meetings, and industry events.

- Developing quotes and proposals for clients.

- Developing goals for the development team

and business growth and ensuring they are met.

- Training personnel and helping team members develop their skills.

- Managing the handling and assigning of daily tasks within the company.

- Holding regular meetings with all departments to ensure open communication and expectations throughout a project.

Requirements:
- Experience in sales, marketing or related field.

- Strong communication skills and IT fluency.

- Ability to manage complex projects and multi-task.

- Excellent organizational skills.

- Ability to flourish with minimal guidance, be proactive, and handle uncertainty.

- Proficient in Word, Excel, Outlook, and PowerPoint.

- Comfortable using a computer for various tasks.

- Experience with design and implementation of business development strategy

- Conflict resolution

postedCompany.description:
ABOUT US

SBM Group since its inception in 2007 in Singapore has been one of the pioneers in the field of Marine Offshore Services, Shipbuilding and Repairing, Oil and Gas Engineering enabling significant progress in efficiency of services by providing real-time information and process control solutions.

Our engineering team has a varied domain expertise in the field of steel works, piping, mechanical, electrical, instrumentation & automation and information management. We focus on devising and providing customized solutions for the industries with our extensive knowledge and expertise in this field. We are well- equipped with a consolidated engineering setup thereby offering consistent line of specialised services, systems and products. These range from Technical and Engineering Services; Construction & Commissioning; and project management.

Our core business comprises of wide-range of comprehensive services such as Ship Building and Ship Repairing, Mobile Drilling Units, Repairs, Control System Design and installation onboard the vessel and a diversified land-based automation services. Our service exceeds the industry standards proving our potential in this field. SBM Group personnel’s skills and qualification will take our patrons reach heights in their venture.
postedCompany.name: SBM GROUP OF COMPANIES PTE. LTD.
